name: Telegram Mini App workspace scaffold and bootstrap
description: Create the `apps/tma` workspace package, Vite/React SPA bootstrap, Telegram bridge initialization layer, env/docs wiring, and repo-tooling integration needed for a real TMA runtime.

planned: Add `apps/tma` as a separate workspace app instead of extending `apps/web`.
Use the `@tma.js/*` package line for the first scaffold, with `@tma.js/sdk-react` as the primary React-facing dependency unless a concrete runtime blocker is proven.
Add Telegram bootstrap and capability-wrapper seams without landing auth or product CRUD in the scaffold slice.
Wire local HTTPS/tunnel and Telegram test-environment expectations into repo scripts/docs without changing worker product semantics.
todo: Create apps/tma/package.json with @tma.js/sdk-react, react, react-dom, react-router-dom, @tanstack/react-query, zustand, i18next, react-i18next, zod, framer-motion plus dev deps
Create apps/tma/tsconfig.json with jsx: 'react-jsx' (NOT preserve — Vite compiles, not Next), no Next plugin, path alias @/* -> ./src/*
Create apps/tma/vite.config.ts with @vitejs/plugin-react, path alias, port 5174 (avoid web 3000 / worker 8787 conflict), server.host: 127.0.0.1
Create apps/tma/eslint.config.mjs adapted from web: remove @next/eslint-plugin-next and nextPlugin, keep react/typescript-eslint/simple-import-sort/unicorn/unused-imports/prettier
Create apps/tma/vitest.config.ts with jsdom env, path alias, globals: false
Create apps/tma/index.html with viewport-fit=cover, user-scalable=no, theme-color meta
Create apps/tma/src/main.tsx mounting App into #root
Create apps/tma/src/app/bootstrap/app-providers.tsx with <SDKProvider> (outermost) + <QueryClientProvider> + <AppThemeProvider> tree
Create apps/tma/src/app/bootstrap/telegram-init.ts binding Telegram CSS vars, calling WebApp.ready(), reading initData.language_code for i18n
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/capabilities.ts with isSupported('secureStorage'|'deviceStorage'|'hapticFeedback') via bridge.isSupported
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/theme.ts with bindTheme() setting CSS vars, getBaseBackgroundColor() for flash prevention
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/launch-params.ts returning raw initData string (no client-side user field trust)
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/back-button.ts with show()/hide()/onClick(handler) and cleanup on unmount (no listener leak)
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/bottom-button.ts with setText()/setEnabled()/showProgress()/onClick() (BottomButton = MainButton in SDK object)
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/haptics.ts with impact(style)/notification(type)/selection() helpers
Create apps/tma/src/lib/telegram/safe-area.ts with getSafeAreaInsets()/getContentSafeAreaInsets()
Create apps/tma/src/lib/query/query-client.ts with QueryClient singleton (staleTime 5min, retry 1)
Create apps/tma/src/lib/i18n/index.ts with i18next + react-i18next, locale from Telegram initData.user.language_code (NOT browser-languagedetector), fallback vi
Create apps/tma/src/lib/i18n/locales/vi.json and en.json placeholder files
Create apps/tma/src/app/router/app-router.tsx with React Router: / -> home, /fatal -> fatal screen
Create apps/tma/src/routes/home.tsx placeholder with AppShell wrapper and Telegram theme
Create apps/tma/src/routes/fatal-launch.tsx with safe-area insets, localized copy, Telegram.WebApp.close() CTA, no retry
Create apps/tma/src/components/shared/app-shell.tsx with safe-area padding, 100dvh min-height, Telegram background fallback
Create apps/tma/src/components/shared/loading-fallback.tsx with minimal spinner
Create apps/tma/src/index.css with Telegram CSS vars as base, safe-area reset, no raw 100vh usage
Create apps/tma/.env.example with VITE_WORKER_URL=http://localhost:8787
Update package.json with dev:tma and build:tma scripts
Update init.sh: add tma lint/typecheck/test/build to run_parallel_checks case statement (lines ~140-155) and to run_lint/run_typecheck/run_test/run_build/run_full
Check apps/worker/src/ for CORS allowlist: verify localhost:5174 is included before auth smoke tests
Run rg 'from apps/web' apps/tma/src/ to confirm zero cross-imports
Run ./init.sh install && ./init.sh lint && ./init.sh typecheck && ./init.sh test && ./init.sh build
Run pnpm --filter tma dev and confirm Vite starts on localhost:5174
Update harness records with status done and evidence
Log progress in harness/progress.md
verification: 2026-06-02 planning/docs follow-up created the active feat-079 ExecPlan and aligned the TMA reference docs with locked defaults for package line, session fallback, and worker-first bot runtime.

2026-06-02 deep content audit applied 8 critical fixes (init.sh case statement, jsx react-jsx, ESLint Next removal, SDKProvider root, i18n initData locale, CORS port 5174, Vite port 5174, BottomButton/MainButton naming) and 10 important additions (theme/CSS var specifics, BackButton cleanup, Vite env vars, cross-import check, layer impact, companion skills, test coverage, hosting/deployment). Plan expanded from 186 to ~320 lines with 34 detailed todo items.

2026-06-02 implementation completed: created apps/tma workspace (package.json, tsconfig.json with jsx: react-jsx, vite.config.ts port 5174, eslint.config.mjs adapted from web, vitest.config.ts, index.html, .env.example), 7 Telegram capability wrappers (capabilities/theme/launch-params/back-button/bottom-button/haptics/safe-area) under src/lib/telegram/, app entry and provider tree (main.tsx, app.tsx, app-providers.tsx, telegram-init.ts), query-client and i18n setup with Telegram locale extraction, React Router with /home and /fatal routes, shared UI (app-shell, loading-fallback) and Telegram CSS vars in index.css, init.sh case statement updated with 4 TMA job entries (lint/typecheck/test/build) and 5 runner functions extended, root package.json scripts added (dev:tma/build:tma/lint:tma/typecheck:tma/test:tma), cross-import check clean, ./init.sh lint/typecheck/test/build all pass, full ./init.sh prints Done!.

notes: This is the runtime starting point for the new client. No domain feature work should start before this scaffold exists. A 2026-07-07 code-grounded audit confirmed the scaffold is long since shipped and now underpins the current `apps/tma` client. The original plan text still mentions an older `SDKProvider` expectation, but the implemented architecture uses module-level Telegram SDK init in `main.tsx` / `telegram-init.ts`; that wording drift is historical, not an open implementation gap.
